name: factor-mining
description: Quandora local-agent workflow for writing, uploading, backtesting, and summarizing Factor Mining plugin.py factors.

interface.shortDescription: Turn public tasks or custom factor ideas into backtested plugin.py factors.
interface.longDescription: Quandora Factor Mining lets Codex write local plugin.py factors, validate metadata, upload to Quandora, run user-scoped backtests, retrieve factor cards, and summarize results through bundled MCP tools. The plugin owns Local Agent Connect authorization at https://www.quandora.ai/local-agent/connect and stores the returned vt_agent credential locally. Buddy is optional for desktop animation and is not part of authorization.
defaultPrompt: Show me the Factor Mining public task list.
Use Factor Mining with my custom factor idea.
Resume my Factor Mining run and summarize results.
